Survey.title: Survey
Survey.description: Definition of a custom-built survey structure with questions

questions.description: List of question definitions containing options and groupings

SurveyResponse.title: SurveyResponse
SurveyResponse.description: A submitted survey response from a user

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the response was submitted

/surveys/{surveyId}.description: Master collection storing the survey structures and definitions

/responses/{responseId}.description: Collection storing all submitted survey responses
